/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/api/TMDBClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/core/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/ui/cli.cpp.o -o main  -lsqlite3 -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so
